zh.lifeSummary: 當Frances Holmes於1606年5月5日出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾盧斯金頓時，她的父親Richardus Holmes28歲，母親Margreta Haynes22歲。她於1624年與Mathew James Parham在美國維吉尼亞州素利結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Frances Holmes于1606年5月5日出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾盧斯金頓时，她的父亲Richardus Holmes28岁，母亲Margreta Haynes22岁。她于1624年与Mathew James Parham在美国弗吉尼亚州素利结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州素利。

nameMeanings.name: Holmes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: either from the plural form of Holme , or else a variant of Holme or Home , with excrescent -s (see Holm ).

Scottish: probably a habitational name from Holmes near Dundonald (Ayrshire), or possibly from another place so called in the barony of Inchestuir (Angus). Both placenames likely derive from the plural form of Middle English, Older Scots holm ‘islet, raised land in a marsh’ (see Holm ).

Scottish and Irish: adopted for Scottish Gaelic and Irish Mac Thómais, Mac Thómais (see McComb ). In parts of western Ireland, Holmes is also a variant of Cavish, from Gaelic Mac Thámhais, another patronymic from Thomas . Early bearers in Ireland were probably immigrants from Scotland.

variants.name: Holme
meanings: English (northwestern England): variant of   Holm   and of   Home   3 and 4.
Danish and Swedish: variant of   Holm   1.

variants.name: Homes
meanings: English: variant of   Holmes   and   Home  .

nameMeanings.name: Frances
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of   Francis .  In the 16th century the two spellings were used indiscriminately for both sexes, the distinction in spelling not being established until the 17th century.

historicEvents.description: The Virginia Company founded the first permanent English colony at Jamestown in 1607. One of the original 13 states (it entered the Union in 1788). Virginia holds an important place in American history, as it was home to many of the founding fathers, including George Washington, Thomas Jefferson, James Madison, George Mason, and Patrick Henry. Four of Americas first five presidents were Virginians. During the Civil War, Richmond, Virginias capital, was the capital of the Confederacy. Today, Virginia is a popular tourist spot where people can visit historic places such as Alexandria, Williamsburg, and Mount Vernon, George Washingtons estate.

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Frances Holmes was born on 5 May 1606, in Ruskington, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Richardus Holmes, was 28 and her mother, Margreta Haynes, was 22. She married Mathew James Parham in 1624, in Surry, Virginia, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. She was buried in Surry, Virginia, British Colonial America.

ko.lifeSummary: Frances Holmes(이)가 1606년 5월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 러스킨그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richardus Holmes(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margreta Haynes(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1624년 미국 버지니아 주 수리에서 Mathew James Parham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 수리에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Frances Holmes родилась 5 мая 1606 г. в местности рускингтон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Richardus Holmes было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margreta Haynes, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Mathew James Parham в 1624 г. в местности сурри, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Она была похоронена в местности сурри, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика.
